---
title: "Secant Method"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

Source inspiration: [Numerical Methods Modules](https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html).

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/n2003/SecantMethodMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 2
- Unique animation portals: 1

### Animation Portals

1. [Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/SecantMethod.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 6

### Animation Items

1. [The Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantaa.gif
2. [The Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantbb.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantbb.gif
3. [The Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantcc.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantcc.gif
4. [The Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantdd.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantdd.gif
5. [The Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantee.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantee.gif
6. [The Secant Method](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantff.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/RootFinding/SecantMethod/Secantff.gif
